description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Autorelease that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow should have a concurrency group based on the head reference and cancel in-progress jobs. It should have two jobs: one for Windows and one for macOS. The Windows job should set up WSL, fix line endings, check out a specific repository, run make, create an NSIS installer, zip files, and release assets. The macOS job should check out the repository, install dependencies with Homebrew, run make, and release assets.
